summary: Frontend-only verification of the redesigned Projects overview (card grid) plus regression on ProjectDetailPage, TopNavBar, Portal and About. All 12+ acceptance checks passed.

checks_performed.portal_page: /portal renders SecurePortal auth panel (contains SECURE/PORTAL/PASSCODE text)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: clicking nav-link-projects while already on a /projects/<slug> route did not force a navigation back to the overview in one instance (URL remained at detail). A direct goto('/projects') worked. Likely because the shared projectSlug state in App.tsx is not cleared when nav-link-projects is re-clicked from within a detail route. Not blocking but worth verifying that BACK_TO_PROJECTS + top-nav projects both clear projectSlug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projects overview redesign is complete and verified. 5 cards with correct testids, category + status badges, single VIEW PROJECT button per card, no pre/code/filter/waveform elements on overview. Detail navigation for rv32im-core and rv32im-soc-processor both work. Minor observation: nav-link-projects click while on a project detail route may not reset the projectSlug; use direct URL or BACK_TO_PROJECTS to test reliably.
